# Generated by exon. Do not edit manually.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.30)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 23)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_EXPERIMENTAL_CXX_IMPORT_STD "451f2fe2-a8a2-47c3-bc32-94786d8fc91b")
set(CMAKE_CXX_MODULE_STD ON)
project(codon LANGUAGES CXX)

if(MSVC)
    add_compile_options(/W4 /wd4996 /utf-8)
    add_compile_definitions(_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS)
endif()

if(NOT DEFINED EXON_ENABLE_TEST_TARGETS)
    set(EXON_ENABLE_TEST_TARGETS ON)
endif()

include(FetchContent)
if(NOT TARGET jsoncpp)
    FetchContent_Declare(jsoncpp
        GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/misut/jsoncpp.git
        GIT_TAG v0.1.4
        GIT_SHALLOW ON
    )
    FetchContent_MakeAvailable(jsoncpp)
endif()
if(NOT TARGET tomlcpp)
    FetchContent_Declare(tomlcpp
        GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/misut/tomlcpp.git
        GIT_TAG v0.3.1
        GIT_SHALLOW ON
    )
    FetchContent_MakeAvailable(tomlcpp)
endif()

add_library(codon-modules)
target_sources(codon-modules
    PUBLIC FILE_SET CXX_MODULES BASE_DIRS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} FILES
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/assets.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/book.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/commands.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/core.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/emit.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/manifest.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/markdown.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/summary.cppm
)
target_link_libraries(codon-modules PUBLIC
    jsoncpp
    tomlcpp
)

add_executable(codon)
target_sources(codon PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/main.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(codon PRIVATE codon-modules)

set_source_files_properties(
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/assets.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/book.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/commands.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/core.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/emit.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/manifest.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/markdown.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/summary.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/main.cpp
    PROPERTIES COMPILE_DEFINITIONS
    "EXON_PKG_NAME=\"codon\";EXON_PKG_VERSION=\"0.1.0\""
)
